name: Popcorn Munchy
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 250°F.
2. Melt margarine in a 13x9-inch pan in the oven.
3. Remove from oven and stir in seasoned salt, garlic powder, and Worcestershire sauce.
4. In a large bowl, combine popcorn, wheat squares cereal, crackers, sesame sticks, and peanuts.
5. Pour the melted margarine over the dry ingredients.
6. Toss lightly until all pieces are coated.
7. Divide evenly between 2, 13x9-inch pans.
8. Bake for 1 hour, stirring every 15 minutes.
9. Cool completely.
10. Store in airtight containers. Makes 12 cups.
